title: E-Commerce Website Carts
description: Built a full-featured e-commerce website modeled after the Cartimar marketplace. Integrated MongoDB to manage high-volume product listings and persistent user carts, focusing on a seamless shopping experience.

title: Registra
description: Developed a custom event management platform for ICpEP-NCR as a Capstone project. Streamlined registration workflows and attendee tracking to meet specific organizational requirements.

title: Canteen Management System
description: A Java-based Canteen Management System featuring a custom file-handling backend. Utilizes File Reader/Writer for persistent storage of menu items, orders, and transaction history.
